Containers.Name: WireGuard Watchdog
Containers.Description: WireGuard Watchdog keeps your WireGuard tunnel healthy. It pings a peer through the tunnel on a schedule and bounces the tunnel via wg-quick down/up the moment the peer goes silent. Coexists cleanly with Unraid's built-in WireGuard support -- never touches the interface directly, only invokes wg-quick.
Containers.ExtraSearchTerms: wireguard vpn watchdog tunnel ping bounce wg-quick monitor health peer
